description: Small-company full accounts with headline financials stated in the notes.
inputText:
# Annual Report and Financial Statements

ACME WIDGETS LIMITED
For the year ended 31 December 2022

## Profit and Loss Account

Turnover: 1,250,000
Cost of sales: (820,000)
Gross profit: 430,000
Administrative expenses: (310,000)
Profit for the financial year: 120,000

## Balance Sheet

Total assets: 2,400,000
Creditors: (1,650,000)
Net assets: 750,000

## Notes

Average number of employees during the year: 18
